case_title: MARIANELA REYES DAVILA VS. JUDY PARK GRIGOR et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-13-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-28-2010 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF MARIANELA DAVILA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
